full_text:
The sample was minced into small pieces and dissociated using Dispase, followed by Collagenase & Hyaluronidase (C&H).

Dispase dissociation media included 19.4 ml DMEM/F12+++ (DMEM/F12 supplemented with 1X glutamax, 10 mM HEPES, and 1% pen/strep) + 400 µl Dispase + 200 µl DNAse. Incubated at 37C rotating for 30 min, vortexed before and after. Filtered through 70 µm cell strainer.

Further dissociated the leftover tissue pieces with 17.8 ml DMEM/F12+++, 2 ml Collagenase & Hyaluronidase, and 200 µl DNAse. Incubated at 37°C, rotating for 1 hour, vortexed before and after. Filtered through a 70 µm cell strainer.

Dispase dissociated cells:

RBC lysis with 5 ml for 5 min + 15 ml DMEM/F12+++. After centrifugation, the pellet was loose and accidentally aspirated a small clogged piece containing cells. The final pellet was resuspended in 2 mL of DMEM/F12+++ media.

Sequentially dissociated cells: RBC lysis with 5 ml for 5 min + 15 ml DMEM/F12+++.

The final pellet was resuspended in 2 mL of DMEM/F12+++. For counting, a 1:10 dilution was made.

Cell counts:

Biobanking

Dispase dissociated cells: 3x 8 E6 cells

Sequentially dissociated cells: 5x 15 E6 cells

Cells were frozen in 1mL of STEM-CellBanker.

| | Dispase | Dispase + C&H
1) | total [E6 cells/ml] | 12.2 | 5.33
 | live [E6 cells/ml] | 9.02 | 2.74
 | viability [%] | 73.9 | 51.4
 | size [µm] | 8.2 | 8.5
2) | total [E6 cells/ml] | 11.9 | 5.10
 | live [E6 cells/ml] | 8.00 | 2.54
 | viability [%] | 67.8 | 49.8
 | size [µm] | 8.3 | 8.7
Average | [cells/ml] | 12.02 E6 | 5.215 E6 x10
= 52.15 E6
 | total [cells] | 24.04 E6 in 2 mL | 104.3 E6 in 2 ml
 | viability [%] | 70.85 | 50.6
